name: Mailbox Item Deleted by Another User
notes: This rule triggers when a mailbox item is deleted by a user other than the mailbox owner. This could reveal abuse of rights on a mailbox.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Message Deleted
when the event matches "Target Username" != "Sender" and "Target Username" is not NULL AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Mailbox Item Deleted by Another User on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Message Deleted
AND when the event matches "Target Username" != "Sender" and "Target Username" is not NULL AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Mailbox Item Deleted by Another User
Event description: Detects when a mailbox item is deleted by a user other than the mailbox owner.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Sender (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
